_comment: TIER 2 quality-gate baselines (W1-T25, MASTER-PLAN §5 'Coverage ratchet' /
'Mutation-testing baseline' / 'Duplication budget'). Captured at onboarding
so every ratchet has a real floor from day one (§5A) — never lowered by a
PR; only raised, by hand, once the new number has held for a while.
coverage: measured via `node --test --experimental-test-coverage` (see
.github/scripts/coverage-ratchet.mjs). Node's --test-coverage-* threshold
flags only compare at INTEGER-percent granularity (verified empirically —
93.76 passed a 93.76 threshold against 93.75% actual, but so did every
non-integer value below 94; only whole-percent thresholds actually gate).
These floors are the measured baseline at PR time (93.75/91.77/92.03),
floored to the nearest whole percent so today's suite passes exactly at
the floor.
coverage_measured_at_baseline: { lines: 93.75, branches: 91.77, functions: 92.03 }
duplication: jscpd 'total duplicated lines %' across the whole tree
(.jscpd.json). Measured 1.99% at baseline; ceiling set to 3 for headroom.
mutation: Stryker (command runner, src/lib/**/*.ts only — src/run-task.ts
and src/spike.ts are CLI glue, excluded; see stryker.conf.mjs). Runs on a
schedule + push-to-main (.github/workflows/mutation.yml), NOT per-PR — a
full run serially executes the whole suite once per mutant (no per-mutant
test selection without a Jest/Mocha/Karma runner plugin, and TypeScript 7
breaks Stryker's sandboxed tsconfig rewrite, forcing --inPlace i.e.
concurrency 1 — see stryker.conf.mjs comment). Mutation score is the
falsifier coverage % cannot provide: green tests that kill no mutants are
theater (LEARNINGS).

mutation.note: BOOTSTRAP — null disables Stryker's thresholds.break (stryker.conf.mjs reads this file directly), so the mutation.yml job reports the score but never fails on it yet. A full src/lib run is ~6200 mutants at ~2s/mutant serially (inPlace forces concurrency 1) — multiple hours, infeasible to run inline while authoring this PR (measured directly: a 2-file/291-mutant slice of src/lib took 9m30s — see PR description). Once the first real scheduled/dispatched mutation.yml run on main completes, hand-record its score here (never fabricate one) to arm the ratchet.
